Author: Rey Alex
Name: Gpose Cast
Description: A compact GPose casting tool. Search visible actors, import overworld players into GPose for Brio/Ktisis, build a picked group, and hide everyone else locally for cleaner screenshots.
Punchline: Build a picked GPose cast and hide everyone else.
Changelog: Safer optional non-player hiding: only character-like NPC/pet/minion actors are alpha-hidden, generic event/world objects are skipped, and restore lookups are guarded by kind/name when object-table slots are reused.
